name: Credibanco Colombian Payment Network REST API
what_it_does: Credibanco Colombian payment network REST API for Colombian merchants, banks, and fintechs to process credit card, debit card, and electronic payments through Colombia's principal card payment network — enabling card authorization, merchant acquiring, installment payment processing, and payment analytics through Credibanco's payment network serving 300,000+ affiliated merchants and co-operating with Visa, Mastercard, and Colombian card issuers. Enables AI agents to manage card authorization for Colombian card payment processing automation, handle installment payment for Colombian cuotas financing automation, access merchant services for card terminal and gateway integration automation, retrieve payment confirmation for order fulfillment verification automation, manage refund for payment reversal processing automation, handle fraud detection for Colombian transaction risk management automation, access loyalty for Colombian card rewards program automation, retrieve settlement for daily merchant payment reconciliation automation, manage recurring billing for subscription payment automation, and integrate Credibanco with Colombian e-commerce, retail POS, and banking platforms for card payment network automation.
use_cases: Processing credit and debit card payments through Colombian card network for merchant automation agents
Managing installment payment plans (cuotas) for Colombian consumer financing at checkout automation agents
Integrating Credibanco acquiring with Colombian e-commerce platforms for card payment acceptance automation agents
Accessing settlement and reconciliation data for Colombian merchant daily financial reporting automation agents
not_for: Non-Colombian markets (Credibanco is Colombia-specific card payment network)
Bank transfer payments (Credibanco is card network, not ACH/PSE bank transfer)
International cross-border card acquiring (Credibanco focuses on domestic Colombian card processing)
best_when: A Colombian merchant, bank, or fintech wanting AI agents to process credit and debit card payments, manage installment financing (cuotas), and access merchant services through Credibanco's Colombian card payment network serving 300,000+ merchants.
avoid_when: MERCHANT ACQUIRING AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Credibanco requires merchant acquiring agreement through member bank; automated direct API access assumption creates requires_acquiring_agreement; automated must establish Credibanco acquiring relationship through member bank. CUOTAS REQUIRES ISSUER COOPERATION: Colombian installment payment (cuotas) requires coordination with card-issuing bank; automated universal cuotas assumption creates issuer_not_participating for banks not supporting specific installment plans; automated must verify issuer participation for cuotas products. SUPERFINANCIERA COMPLIANCE: Credibanco operates under Colombia's Superintendencia Financiera de Colombia; automated non-regulated payment processing assumption creates compliance_risk; automated must comply with Colombian payment regulations. INTEGRATION TYPICALLY VIA PAYMENT GATEWAY: Most merchants integrate Credibanco through certified payment gateways (PayU, PlacetoPay, ePayco); automated direct-network integration assumption misses gateway certification layer; automated should evaluate gateway vs. direct integration path.

auth.notes: Credibanco uses API key + OAuth2 for payment network REST API. REST API with JSON. Bogotá, Colombia HQ. Founded 1970 as part of Colombian banking system. Products: Credit card processing, debit card, installments (cuotas), merchant acquiring, loyalty, fraud prevention. SDKs: None public. 300,000+ merchants. Visa and Mastercard network partner. Superfinanciera regulated. Competes with Redeban for Colombian card network market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for certified payment partners; production requires acquiring agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: MDR (merchant discount rate); per-transaction acquiring fees; installment plan fees; enterprise contracts
pricing.notes: Bogotá CO. Superfinanciera. MDR-based. 300,000+ merchants. Colombian card network.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; authorization and processing APIs throttled per merchant tier

known_agent_gotchas: CUOTAS IS COLOMBIA-SPECIFIC INSTALLMENT LOGIC: Colombian installment payments (cuotas) have specific promotion codes and bank coordination requirements; automated generic installment assumption creates wrong_promotion_code for cuotas transactions; automated must use correct Colombian cuotas promotion codes per issuing bank

AUTHORIZATION REVERSAL TIMING: Credibanco authorization reversals have time limits before becoming full capture; automated unlimited reversal window assumption creates reversal_timeout for late reversals; automated must implement timely reversal for authorized-but-not-settled transactions

3DS REQUIRED FOR CARD-NOT-PRESENT: Credibanco requires 3DS authentication for e-commerce card-not-present transactions; automated non-3DS e-commerce assumption creates authentication_required; automated must implement 3DS2 authentication flow for online payments

COLOMBIAN PESO ONLY: Credibanco processes COP (Colombian Peso) only; automated USD-pricing assumption creates currency_conversion_required; automated must display and process amounts in COP with Colombian locale formatting

MERCHANT CATEGORY CODE MATTERS: Credibanco uses MCC codes for transaction classification affecting fees and fraud rules; automated wrong-MCC assumption creates incorrect fee calculation; automated must register correct MCC for merchant business type
agent_readiness.security_notes: Colombian card network. PCI-DSS, Superfinanciera. API key + OAuth2. Colombia. Card payment and cardholder data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Colombian card network. PCI-DSS, Superfinanciera. API key + OAuth2. Colombia. Card and payment data.
